name: Barbara
title: Life is Forever Changed
text: The Work, The Syllabus, The Questions. Jeff has a way about him to cut to the heart of the matter. It's not always easy but definitely worth it. Jeff is supportive and expansive. Having awareness is the first step to transformation and with Jeff this becomes the roadmap of your life. A life filled with joy, peace and love in a way that I never had experienced before. I like to call it The Unlearning of Barbara B. I am no longer caught up in my stories of lack. Thanks a million, Jeff!

name: Veronica
title: Learning to see things in a different way
text: Jeff is like a lighthouse. Metaphorically speaking, he has helped me navigate through life's challenges and difficult times. Jeff provides a sense of direction, safety, and hope. And just like a lighthouse, Jeff helps me see when I'm off course. And when I find myself in the middle of the ocean alone and afraid, his light, his smile, his compassion, his patience become the light that helps me find my way during darkness or uncertainty.

name: Rachael
title: Empowering Transformation!
text: I started working with Jeff since Feb 2023 and looking back I can not tell you how much I have grown, and finally seeing life for what it is. BEAUTIFUL! Thanks to Jeff i understand that I am not just a mom, a wife, a daughter, and a friend. I am on the path to love myself. I wholeheartedly recommend Jeff to anyone seeking not only a life coach but a genuine partner in their personal development journey.

name: Tyler
title: Everyone needs a Jeff
text: Jeff's guidance has saved my life. I was in therapy for 17 years. I struggled with anxiety, depression and addiction. Jeff is not only a safe place for me but someone whose guidance I can trust. I could never imagine my life & headspace where they are today. Everybody needs a Jeff in their life. Thank you universe for allowing our paths to cross!

name: Yumi
title: A Road to Self Empowerment
text: I find myself saying 'my life coach has changed my life' to everyone I know. With Jeff's life coaching I finally understand what self respect feels like. Jeff taught me to be self sufficient. Before I would blame everyone around me instead of forgiving one's that have hurt me. If you are ready find ways to free yourself from burdens that haunt you, or even if you want and need someone to really hear you, cry with you, make you look at your mirror and empower you, Jeff is the perfect person.

name: Denitra
title: Awaken!!!
text: Jeff is amazing!! I struggle with anxiety and depression.. when I started with Jeff it was hard to comprehend what was real vs what my ego is telling me, but in one session right before my eyes the negative assumptions changed and I saw the positive outcome. Jeff is the real deal!!! He knows how to get you to see the real story. I absolutely love him.. and so grateful that he was manifested in my life. I even use the tools he has given me to help my kids!!! Now that's priceless.

name: Peter
title: Transformational
text: I feel like I've know Jeff for a life time even though I've only known him for a couple of years and only met in-person once. It is incredible the way Jeff is able to 'get alongside me' as life throws up different challenges. My conversations with Jeff have radically changed my life for the better in ways that I can't possibly hope to articulate in a few sentences. In some ways I feel like I've only just started such is the excitement around the way that I've changed and the corresponding changes happening around me.

name: Mike Barnett
title: At the root of it all
text: Sometimes just the idea of therapy feels like it might help but it that's not about resolution and freedom.. that's about keeping the old story going and feeding it… Jeff is about freedom… freedom of our pasts that don't serve us and keep us living from a stale point in time. When I think back to what he was telling me would be possible for me… I loved the idea and felt hope but a large part of me felt it might be a fantasy. It was not a fantasy… I'm living proof of what he told me was possible.

name: Nicole
title: Changed Life
text: When I first started with Jeff I was a total wreck. Working myself to death, family issues, anger issues and so much more. He has helped me become a stable person that look at life in a total different mirror nowadays. This is the best money that I have spent and can't wait to see how much further this ride will take me. Thanks Jeff!

name: Jonathan
title: Gratitude
text: I've been coming to Jeff for counseling and coaching for many years now. I have also tried other therapists and counselors occasionally but Jeff's insight has most consistently had a profound and long term impact on my life and state of mind. One of the things I most appreciate about Jeff is his process- he's there to facilitate YOUR awakening/understanding ... not just give a quick answer or fix. I've introduced Jeff to literally a dozen or more of my close friends and watched over and over again how he has had a profoundly positive impact on their lives as well.

name: Dallas
title: Godsend!
text: Jeff is an absolute godsend. So far we've had two counseling sessions and it has changed the dynamic of our marriage in so many positive ways. Before we started talking with Jeffrey our marriage was in shambles and on the way to divorce court. Thank you Jeffrey for everything and we look forward to working with you further.

name: April
title: Bright side of things...
text: The sessions with Jeff have been very positive and enlightening. Highly recommend if you have a goal to see the bright side of things in life.

name: Meghan
title: Jeff and his work have been so instrumental in my healing
text: Jeff and his work have been so instrumental in my healing and self work. His guidance and tools have changed my life and I am forever grateful for what he has taught me. I have a new perspective on life and am happier than I have ever been thanks to working with Jeff. He has done the work himself so he has an amazing understanding of how to connect with you in a real way.

name: Emily
title: Truly life changing
text: I've only worked with Jeff a few times but I have utilized his teachings consistently. I feel like I'm out here spreading the gospel, telling all my friends to call him. Life coaching has been far more transformative for me than counseling. If you're wondering if it's worth it, I promise you, it's worth every penny. Just like athletes need coaching, sometimes the mind does too.

name: Jamie
title: Life Changing
text: I can honestly say that over the past 2 years Jeff has helped me totally transform the way I think and my approach to life's difficulties. Going through a marital separation can be a vortex leading downwards but Jeff has shown me that I can actually use this experience to discover 'abundant life' within me which totally flips the negative into an amazing positive! Being fairly stubborn and rigid in my thinking, I never imagined someone could help me see things totally differently.

name: Emilia
title: Awesome!
text: Jeff's bright and kind smile made me feel at ease immediately. Since taking his advice, my day to day experiences are rich with awareness. I am making better choices and feeling GOOD.
